package.name: chrono_wec_simulation
package.description:
WEC wave-body dynamics simulation node for the ROS2 HIL Dynamometer.
Implements a linearised 1-DOF heaving buoy model (Falnes, 2002) as a placeholder for the full HydroChrono/SeaStack integration. The node subscribes to the physical PTO torque feedback and publishes velocity/position commands to the hydro emulator motor, closing the HIL loop.
The dynamics interface (WecBodyDynamics) is designed to be swapped for a HydroChrono implementation without any changes to downstream nodes.
